---
title: "Vyshnavi Yalamanchi"
image: images/profile.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/vyshnavi-yalamanchi-130900308
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/vyshnavi-yalamanchi
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:vyasjdp@gmail.com
---

## Hello!

I'm Vyshnavi, a Computer Science graduate currently pursuing my Master’s degree in Business Analytics at Dublin City University, with a strong interest in applying data to solve business problems. I am keen to explore the business sector further, particularly in management. I have worked on deep learning projects and gained exposure to finance, retail, and entrepreneurship, enabling me to analyse data, generate insights, and contribute to solving real-world business challenges.

This site is my personal portfolio where I share my [projects](projects/index.qmd), [background](about.qmd), and what I've been [learning along the way](reflection.qmd).

Feel free to [reach out](contact.qmd) if you'd like to connect.
